---
title: "Monokai"
description: "A classic Monokai-inspired theme for terminal apps."
---

<TerminalPreview defaultThemeKey="monokai">
  <ThemeShowcasePreview />
</TerminalPreview>

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-monokai.json
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { monokaiTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/monokai";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={monokaiTheme}>
      <Badge variant="info">Monokai</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```
